promoted_scope: Bounded deterministic 2-3 class FIMIX-PLS score-space segmentation with probabilities, memberships, class paths/R2, log-likelihood, information criteria, entropy, and convergence diagnostics.

checks.name: bounded_deterministic_scope_documented
checks.detail: Known difference states QuickPLS promotes bounded deterministic score-space segmentation, not blanket EM/FIMIX parity.

checks.name: recovery_and_null_evidence_present
checks.detail: Integrated v0.6 report and segmentation recovery artifacts cover class recovery/null behavior.

note: Promotion is limited to this documented scope; broader variants remain experimental or unsupported.
